mapper.select: SELECT sms_seq, sms_clc, cb_num, src_num, sms_kind, filter_kind, spam_word, prv_kind, sms_leng, sms_msg, cb_url, cust_num, image_file_name, spam_pattern1, spam_pattern2, spam_pattern3, tel_id, msg_origination FROM customer_spam_message WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID} AND ( (sms_kind = '4' AND sms_clc >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) OR (sms_kind != '4' AND sms_clc >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) ) ORDER BY sms_clc DESC LIMIT #{maxMsgCnt}
SELECT sms_seq, image_decoding_key, save_dt, image_file_name, cb_num FROM customer_spam_message WHERE cust_num = #{decodeUserID} AND sms_seq = #{seqNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tworld_configurations_history ( job_dt, usr_id, cust_num, job_kind, rst, job_msg ) VALUES ( DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), 'PASS', #{custNum}, '26', #{rst}, #{jobMsg} )
